pages.text: $(italic)Tinkers' Construct$() — the first of its six books, and the one to open first. It teaches the Tinker Station: tools built from parts, parts that carry their material's traits, and why a Tinkers' tool need never be thrown away.$(br2)$(bold)To craft:$() a $(italic)Book$() + a $(italic)Pattern$().
pages.title: Materials and You
